title: astilbe glaberrima
intro: Astilbe glaberrima, also known as smooth astilbe, is a perennial plant species in the family Saxifragaceae. Traditionally, Astilbe glaberrima has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, sore throats, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Astilbe glaberrima is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
